security_gap.gap_description: Malicious Token Manager may intentionally halt the offering of Incentive Tokens, causing a denial of service for the Reward Vault users.

actor_risk.description: One wallet address is responsible for offering an Incentive Token

behavioral_risk.rationale: A malicious Token Manager could disrupt the system by halting the offering of Incentive Tokens, leading to a denial of service for Reward Vault users.

assumptions: The Token Manager is a trusted entity that will always act in the best interest of the system.
There is no backup mechanism to continue offering Incentive Tokens if the Token Manager becomes unavailable or malicious.

mitigation.strategy: Implement a multi-signature scheme for the Token Manager's wallet to prevent a single point of failure. Introduce a governance mechanism to replace a malicious or unavailable Token Manager.

description: A malicious or unavailable Token Manager could halt the offering of Incentive Tokens, causing a denial of service for users of the Reward Vault.
